summary: Backend-only test suite for Blaze Rounds Collector API. Created pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_blaze_api.py covering all 8 requested behaviors (root, bulk insert + color inference + dedupe, single insert + source-required 400, list with source filter and no _id leakage, scoped/global delete, stats with shape validation, and prediction 400 vs valid response). All 14 tests PASSED (100%) against the public URL EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL.

minor.issue: Dedupe key includes color, but color is derived from number, so it is redundant — not a bug, just a minor inefficiency.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handlers in a future cleanup.

critical_code_review_comments: Dedupe key for bulk includes time_str and seconds — if a site omits seconds two identical entries within the same minute could collide; consider also using site_ts when available.
list_rounds sorts by captured_at (server time) instead of site_ts; ordering may not match the actual round order from the source site if batches arrive out of order.
Prediction uses a fixed minimum of 5 rounds but window has a floor of 10 — when 5-9 rounds exist, the route works but the rationale message says 'Janela {total}' which is fine; ok.
seed_data_creation: Tests seed and clean their own data using DELETE /api/rounds?source=... before and after each scenario; the session-scoped autouse fixture cleans tipminer/megatroia/manual at start and finish. No leftover test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public API base URL is read from frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_blaze_api.py for regression. Note that some tests (stats, prediction-400, list-empty) delete ALL rounds, so do not run in parallel against shared data.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no issues found. All 8 requested behaviors verified end-to-end including: color inference (0=white, 1-7=red, 8-14=black), dedupe via (source,number,time_str,seconds), 422 for invalid source and out-of-range number, 400 when source missing on POST /api/rounds, _id excluded from GET responses, scoped DELETE preserves other sources, stats percentages 1-decimal summing to ~100, current streak & last_white_ago correct, prediction 400 under 5 rounds and valid PT-BR rationale with scores summing to ~100.
